cached_nudges: Your 7-day footprint is 125.5 kg CO2. At this rate, your annual footprint will be 6.5 tons, exceeding the average Indian urban resident (1.8 tons).
You completed meatless and green commute days this week! Your 3-day streak is active, and the virtual sky is clearing up.
Your current streak is 3 days. Every day you log without high-energy appliance runs, the virtual sky in your dashboard turns a shade cleaner.
Your rolling footprint is currently 58.3 kg CO2, matching the low-carbon target for global climate goals. Keep keeping it clean!
Log your first eco-friendly choice today to kick off your streak and start clearing up the virtual sky!
Every day you log without high-energy appliance runs, the virtual sky in your dashboard turns a shade cleaner. Start tracking today!

Your Delhi-Mumbai flight generated 90 kg CO2. That single trip offset 6 weeks of the eco-actions you completed this month. If you take that route 3x a year, it represents 35% of your annual footprint.
Your daily petrol car commute generates substantial CO2. Swapping just 1 day a week to public transit or cycling saves 8.4 kg CO2—equivalent to charging a laptop for 6 months.

Your Meatless Day saved 1.8 kg CO2. That is equivalent to charging your smartphone every day for an entire year.
Your 15 km car trip added 2.85 kg CO2. That's comparable to running your AC for about 2.5 hours, and it represents almost 5% of your total footprint this week.
Fantastic work on your 1-day streak! Every logged action, big or small, helps make your invisible carbon impact visible.
Your streak is currently 0 days. Log your first eco-action today to kickstart your journey and begin visualizing your impact.
Your 7-day footprint is 58.3 kg CO2. Completing just one sustainable action today can begin to lower this and start your positive streak.
Every small step counts. Log any mindful choice you've made today, like using public transport or a meatless meal, to start building a powerful habit and streak.
The short flight you logged contributed 90 kg CO2, making up over half of your 7-day footprint. This single trip is equivalent to driving 500 km in a typical petrol car.
Your 100 km car trip generated 18 kg CO2, which is 60 times more than the 0.3 kg CO2 saved by your vegan meal. Consider pairing more eco-friendly travel with your dietary choices for greater impact.
Your current streak is 0 days. Log another activity or complete an eco-action today to kickstart your journey and build a positive habit!
Your streak is currently 0 days. Log an activity or complete an eco-action today to kickstart your journey and begin tracking your impact!
Your recent short flight generated 90 kg CO2. That single trip accounts for over half of your 7-day footprint, offsetting many eco-actions you might take.
Driving 100 km in a car produced 18 kg CO2. That's equivalent to charging your smartphone every day for almost two years.
Your streak is currently 0 days. Log your first eco-action today, like a plant-based meal or choosing public transport, to kickstart your tracking and see your positive impact grow!
Your short flight generated 90 kg CO2, accounting for over half your total footprint this week. This single trip offset the carbon savings of 300 vegan meals.
The 100 km you drove contributed 18 kg CO2. This is roughly the amount of carbon a mature tree absorbs over 10 months.
Your streak is at 0 days. Log your next eco-action or meal to kickstart your streak and begin visualizing your impact!
Your recent short flight contributed 90 kg CO2, representing over half (54%) of your entire 7-day footprint. That single flight offset the impact of 300 vegan meals.
The 100 km you drove by car generated 18 kg CO2, equivalent to the emissions saved by enjoying 60 vegan meals. Consider combining errands or exploring public transport for shorter trips.
Your streak is at 0 days. Log an action today to kickstart your journey and begin building towards a greener habit!
Your recent short flight generated 90 kg CO2, which is over half of your 7-day footprint. This single trip is equivalent to driving your car for 500 km.
Your 100 km car trip generated 18 kg CO2, wiping out the savings from 60 vegan meals. Consider combining errands or opting for public transport.

challenges.title: No-Car Day
challenges.description: Commute via bicycle, walking, or public transport.

challenges.title: Meatless Day
challenges.description: Eat strictly vegetarian or vegan meals for the entire day.

challenges.title: AC Hibernate
challenges.description: Keep the air conditioner turned off for 24 hours.

challenges.title: Appliance Break
challenges.description: Avoid using heavy electricity drawing appliances (dryer, oven).

challenges.title: Local shopping
challenges.description: Buy fresh ingredients locally rather than imported shipped items.
